description.value: Vagaari Beast Training. Vagaari often hide beasts on their body in order to use them against their opponents. You have proficiency in the Animal Handling skill. Additionally, you can hide a Tiny willing beast on your person in stasis. You can hold a number of beasts on your person like this equal to half your proficiency bonus (rounded up). When you reach 3rd level, you can forgo holding several Tiny beasts to hide one Small willing beast on your person. As a bonus action, you can release any number of these beasts, allowing them to make one attack against any opponent within range with advantage. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest.
